languages.text: Элитные Дароносцы Заркова славились невообразимой стойкостью и пугающим фанатизмом. Аугментированные воины династии слыли бесстрашными машинами убийства, усиливая любой батальон, к которому их приставляли. Говорят, они никогда не отступали в бою, зная, что даже в гибели обретут искупление, а их импланты потом перейдут следующему отважному зарковцу, породив нового Дароносца.

Zarkovs Gabenträger erlangten Bekanntheit für ihre unglaubliche Resilienz und ihren erschreckenden Fanatismus. Die augmentierten Krieger der Dynastie waren als furchtlose Tötungsmaschinen bekannt und mehrten die Macht jedes Bataillons, dem sie zugeteilt wurden. Es hieß, sie würden sich nie aus einer Schlacht zurückziehen, da sie wussten, dass sie selbst im Tod Erlösung finden und ihre Implantate an nachfolgende Zarkovianer übergeben würden, um neue Gabenträger zu schaffen.
languages.original_text: Zarkov's elite Giftbearers were renowned for their incredible resilience and terrifying fanaticism. The dynasty's augmented warriors were known as fearless killing machines, increasing the might of any battalion to which they were assigned. They were said never to retreat in battle, knowing that even in death they would find atonement, and that their implants would then pass to the next brave Zarkovian and give rise to a new Giftbearer.

languages.text: ザルコフの精鋭たる贈与を担う者たちは、その驚異的な頑健さと戦慄すべき狂信ぶりで知られていた。王朝の強化された戦士たちは恐れを知らぬ殺戮機械として名を馳せ、配属されたいかなる大隊の戦力をも増大させた。彼らは戦場で決して退かぬと言われていた――死してなお贖罪を見出し、そのインプラントは次なる勇敢なザルコフ人へと受け継がれ、新たな贈与を担う者を生み出すと知っていたからである。
languages.original_text: Zarkov's elite Giftbearers were renowned for their incredible resilience and terrifying fanaticism. The dynasty's augmented warriors were known as fearless killing machines, increasing the might of any battalion to which they were assigned. They were said never to retreat in battle, knowing that even in death they would find atonement, and that their implants would then pass to the next brave Zarkovian and give rise to a new Giftbearer.

languages.text: 扎尔科夫的精英持礼者以惊人的韧性和令人胆寒的狂热而闻名。这些王朝的植入物改造战士被誉为无所畏惧的杀戮机器，无论被编入哪支部队，都足以令其战力倍增。据说他们在战斗中从不撤退，因为他们知道死亡本身也是一种赎罪。他们的植入物将传给下一位勇敢的扎尔科夫人，从而催生出新的持礼者。
languages.original_text: Zarkov's elite Giftbearers were renowned for their incredible resilience and terrifying fanaticism. The dynasty's augmented warriors were known as fearless killing machines, increasing the might of any battalion to which they were assigned. They were said never to retreat in battle, knowing that even in death they would find atonement, and that their implants would then pass to the next brave Zarkovian and give rise to a new Giftbearer.

languages.text: Zarkov'un seçkin Armağanlıları, inanılmaz dayanıklılıkları ve korkutucu fanatizmleriyle ün salmıştı. Hanedanlığın ogmentli savaşçıları, atandıkları her taburun gücünü artıran korkusuz ölüm makineleri olarak biliniyordu. Savaşta asla geri çekilmedikleri söylenirdi. Ölümde bile kefaret bulacaklarını ve implantlarının daha sonra bir sonraki cesur Zarkovluya geçerek yeni bir Armağanlı doğuracağını bilirlerdi.
languages.original_text: Zarkov's elite Giftbearers were renowned for their incredible resilience and terrifying fanaticism. The dynasty's augmented warriors were known as fearless killing machines, increasing the might of any battalion to which they were assigned. They were said never to retreat in battle, knowing that even in death they would find atonement, and that their implants would then pass to the next brave Zarkovian and give rise to a new Giftbearer.

traits.locale_text: Zarkov'un seçkin Armağanlıları, inanılmaz dayanıklılıkları ve korkutucu fanatizmleriyle ün salmıştı. Hanedanlığın ogmentli savaşçıları, atandıkları her taburun gücünü artıran korkusuz ölüm makineleri olarak biliniyordu. Savaşta asla geri çekilmedikleri söylenirdi. Ölümde bile kefaret bulacaklarını ve implantlarının daha sonra bir sonraki cesur Zarkovluya geçerek yeni bir Armağanlı doğuracağını bilirlerdi.

languages.text: Los portadores de regalos de Zarkov fueron reconocidos por su increíble tenacidad y su aterrador fanatismo. Los guerreros aumentados de la dinastía se hicieron célebres como intrépidas máquinas de matar que incrementaban el poder de los batallones a los que se asignaban. Se decía que jamás retrocedían en combate, pues sabían que en la muerte hallarían su expiación y que sus implantes se legarían a otro bravo zarkoviano que se convertiría así en un nuevo portador de regalos.
languages.original_text: Zarkov's elite Giftbearers were renowned for their incredible resilience and terrifying fanaticism. The dynasty's augmented warriors were known as fearless killing machines, increasing the might of any battalion to which they were assigned. They were said never to retreat in battle, knowing that even in death they would find atonement, and that their implants would then pass to the next brave Zarkovian and give rise to a new Giftbearer.

traits.locale_text: Los portadores de regalos de Zarkov fueron reconocidos por su increíble tenacidad y su aterrador fanatismo. Los guerreros aumentados de la dinastía se hicieron célebres como intrépidas máquinas de matar que incrementaban el poder de los batallones a los que se asignaban. Se decía que jamás retrocedían en combate, pues sabían que en la muerte hallarían su expiación y que sus implantes se legarían a otro bravo zarkoviano que se convertiría así en un nuevo portador de regalos.

languages.text: Les Porte-dons d'élite de Zarkov étaient connus pour leur incroyable résilience et leur dévouement à toute épreuve. Les guerriers augmentés de la dynastie étaient considérés comme des machines à tuer impitoyables, capables de décupler la puissance des bataillons auxquels ils étaient assignés. Ils avaient la réputation de ne jamais battre en retraite, sachant que même dans la mort, ils trouveraient l'expiation et que leurs implants seraient transmis à d'autres courageux Zarkoviens qui deviendraient à leur tour des Porte-dons.
languages.original_text: Zarkov's elite Giftbearers were renowned for their incredible resilience and terrifying fanaticism. The dynasty's augmented warriors were known as fearless killing machines, increasing the might of any battalion to which they were assigned. They were said never to retreat in battle, knowing that even in death they would find atonement, and that their implants would then pass to the next brave Zarkovian and give rise to a new Giftbearer.

traits.locale_text: Les Porte-dons d'élite de Zarkov étaient connus pour leur incroyable résilience et leur dévouement à toute épreuve. Les guerriers augmentés de la dynastie étaient considérés comme des machines à tuer impitoyables, capables de décupler la puissance des bataillons auxquels ils étaient assignés. Ils avaient la réputation de ne jamais battre en retraite, sachant que même dans la mort, ils trouveraient l'expiation et que leurs implants seraient transmis à d'autres courageux Zarkoviens qui deviendraient à leur tour des Porte-dons.

Servir dans l'armée de la dynastie devint une véritable chance pour le peuple. Bien qu'un tel honneur ait un prix, le prestige du régiment ne fit que croître, et en quelques décennies à peine, l'armée de la dynastie von Valancius devint un modèle du « poing de l'Imperium » dans toutes les Étendues de Koronus.
